prompt: blue mushroom wizard with sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff
userPrompt: blue mushroom wizard with sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff
expandedPrompt: A whimsical blue mushroom wizard character with oversized, sleepy eyes that convey a sense of tranquility. The character has a rounded silhouette shaped like a mushroom cap, with a compact body that resembles a toadstool. It wears a tiny, sparkling wizard hat adorned with star patterns and a subtle glow. The wizard holds a tiny glowing staff that emits a soft blue light, surrounded by sparkles. The character features light blue spots on a darker blue body, giving it a magical appearance. The overall expression is serene and dreamy, inviting a sense of calm.

The wizard holds a tiny glowing staff that emits a soft blue light, surrounded by sparkles. The character features light blue spots on a darker blue body, giving it a magical appearance. expandedContent:
{
  "title": "Sleepy Blue Mushroom Wizard",
  "expandedPrompt": "A whimsical blue mushroom wizard character with oversized, sleepy eyes that convey a sense of tranquility. The character has a rounded silhouette shaped like a mushroom cap, with a compact body that resembles a toadstool. It wears a tiny, sparkling wizard hat adorned with star patterns and a subtle glow. The wizard holds a tiny glowing staff that emits a soft blue light, surrounded by sparkles. The character features light blue spots on a darker blue body, giving it a magical appearance. The overall expression is serene and dreamy, inviting a sense of calm.",
  "subject": "a blue mushroom wizard with sleepy eyes and a glowing staff",
  "mood": "dreamy",
  "palettePlan": { "primary": "light blue", "secondary": "dark blue", "accent": "soft white glow" },
  "styleTags": ["cute mascot", "glossy SVG", "blue-avatar quality"],
  "visualChecklist": [
    "oversized mushroom cap head",
    "compact toadstool body",
    "sleepy droopy eyes",
    "tiny glowing staff",
    "sparkling star patterns on hat",
    "light blue spots on body",
    "soft blue glow around staff",
    "rounded feet resembling mushroom stalks"
  ],
  "requiredDetails": [
    "mushroom cap head shape",
    "glowing blue color for staff",
    "serene sleepy expression",
    "sparkling star patterns on wizard hat"
  ],
  "requiredRenderableDetails": [
    { "id": "wizard_hat", "label": "wizard hat", "acceptableShapes": ["hatShape"], "acceptableSockets": ["socket.hat"], "minimumCount": 1 },
    { "id": "tiny_staff", "label": "tiny glowing staff", "acceptableShapes": ["staffShape"], "acceptableSockets": ["socket.staff"], "minimumCount": 1 },
    { "id": "sleepy_eyes", "label": "sleepy eyes", "acceptableShapes": ["eyeShape"], "acceptableSockets": ["socket.eyes"], "minimumCount": 2 },
    { "id": "mushroom_body", "label": "mushroom body", "acceptableShapes": ["bodyShape"], "acceptableSockets": ["socket.body"], "minimumCount": 1 }
  ],
  "forbiddenDetails": ["raw SVG", "HTML", "unvalidated custom shapes", "external images"],
  "qualityConstraints": ["oversized expressive head", "compact connected body", "readable silhouette", "valid renderer sockets only"]
}

{
  "componentName": "SleepyBlueMushroomWizard",

  "cssVariables": {
    "--dude-primary": "#38bdf8",
    "--dude-secondary": "#1e293b",
    "--dude-accent": "#93c5fd",

    "--dude-leg": "#1e293b",
    "--dude-foot": "#facc15"
  },

  "expression": "sleepy",

    { "type": "mushroomCap", "tone": "primary" },
    { "type": "mushroomGills", "tone": "secondary" },
    { "type": "spot", "tone": "primary" },
    { "type": "spot", "tone": "primary" },
    { "type": "hat", "tone": "accent" },
    { "type": "magic-staff", "side": "right", "label": "tiny glowing staff", "tone": "accent" }
  ],
  "notes": ["Includes mushroom cap head shape, glowing staff, and serene sleepy expression."]
}
